TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Siææugh ki anna ni-d'ma-rang ta ti Jesus mou-a-rough ki vaoung ka tou Galilæa, [ka vaoung] ki Tiberias.
Siææugh ki anna ni-d'ma-rang ta ti Jesus mou-a-rough ki vaoung ka tou Galilæa, [ka vaoung] ki Tiberias.
S.TRANSL: Na desen bertrok Jesus ober De zee ban Galilea welcke is [de zee] ban Tiberias.
After these things Jesus went over the sea of Galilee, which is the sea of Tiberias.
這事以後，耶穌渡過加利利海，就是提比哩亞海。

S.FORM: Ka ni-smala-dyliough tyni-æn ta makoi-lalaulau ka maba-toung, alei ka k'ak'yt-tan nein ta na pou-kakidi tyn, ka pa-am't-ten tyn ki maslam.
Ka ni-smala-dyliough tyni-æn ta makoi-lalaulau ka maba-toung, alei ka k'ak'yt-tan nein ta na pou-kakidi tyn, ka pa-am't-ten tyn ki maslam.
S.TRANSL: Ende hem bolgh de een groote schare om Dat sy sijne teechenen sagen die hy dede aen de krancken.
And a great multitude followed him, because they saw his miracles which he did on them that were diseased.
有許多人因為看見他在病人身上所行的神蹟，就跟隨他。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mou-voukkyn ta ti Jesus, miesroung hynna i-tou lam ki Pæhtatæutu-en tyn.
Ka ni-mou-voukkyn ta ti Jesus, miesroung hynna i-tou lam ki Pæhtatæutu-en tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus gingh op den bergh ende sat aldaer neder met sijne Discipulen.
And Jesus went up into a mountain, and there he sat with his disciples.
耶穌上了山，和門徒一同坐在那裏。

S.FORM: Ka tou tamangta Ou-vava-toug-han ki Hali-daeu-en ki Joden.
Ka tou tamangta Ou-vava-toug-han ki Hali-daeu-en ki Joden.
S.TRANSL: Ende het Pascha het Feest der Joden was na by.
And the passover, a feast of the Jews, was nigh.
那時猶太人的逾越節近了。

S.FORM: Irou ka pa-passa ou-vavau tati Jesus ki matta, ka k'yt-tan tyn makoi-lalaulau ka maba-toung ka mou-koua tyniæn, ni-k'ma ti Filippus-an, Peill'-au-mytta toumang ki paoul alei ka mavok-kah ta neni k'atta?

Irou ka pa-passa ou-vavau tati Jesus ki matta, ka k'yt-tan tyn makoi-lalaulau ka maba-toung ka mou-koua tyniæn, ni-k'ma ti Filippus-an, Peill'-au-mytta toumang ki paoul alei ka mavok-kah ta neni k'atta?
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan De oogen ophef-heffende ende siende Dat een groote schare tot hem quam seyde tot Philippem ban waer sullen wy brooden koopen op Dat dese eten mogen:
When Jesus then lifted up his eyes, and saw a great company come unto him, he saith unto Philip, Whence shall we buy bread, that these may eat?
耶穌舉目看見許多人來，就對腓力說：「我們從哪裏買餅叫這些人吃呢？」（

S.FORM: (Râni-pa-sousou-en tyn ta atta tou rihpung-en tyni-æn: ka kavan'-nan tyn mangta ringei-ah tyn.)
(Râni-pa-sousou-en tyn ta atta tou rihpung-en tyni-æn: ka kavan'-nan tyn mangta ringei-ah tyn.)
S.TRANSL: ( Doeh Dit seyde hy hem beproebende : want hy wist selbe wat hy Doen soude. )
And this he said to prove him: for he himself knew what he would do.
他說這話是要試驗腓力；他自己原知道要怎樣行。）

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Filippus tyni-æn, Rou-rouha kæ'æ-toug-han kiloumari ki paoul assi mamsing-ah neini-æn k'atta, alei ka a-tyttyng-ah mara ta maiboa voual neini-æn.
Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Filippus tyni-æn, Rou-rouha kæ'æ-toug-han kiloumari ki paoul assi mamsing-ah neini-æn k'atta, alei ka a-tyttyng-ah mara ta maiboa voual neini-æn.
S.TRANSL: Philippus annbwoorde hem Door twee hondert pennigen broodt en is dese niet ghenoegh op Dat een yegelick ban haer een weynigh neme.
Philip answered him, Two hundred pennyworth of bread is not sufficient for them, that every one of them may take a little.
腓力回答說：「就是二十兩銀子的餅，叫他們各人吃一點也是不夠的。」

S.FORM: Saat ki Pæhtatæutæu'-en tyn, kati Andreas, katæ'i-para ti Simon Petrus, ta ni-k'ma tyni-æn.
Saat ki Pæhtatæutæu'-en tyn, kati Andreas, katæ'i-para ti Simon Petrus, ta ni-k'ma tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Een ban sijne Discipulen [namelick] Andreas De broeder Simonis Petri seyde tot hem
One of his disciples, Andrew, Simon Peter's brother, saith unto him,
有一個門徒，就是西門‧彼得的兄弟安得烈，對耶穌說：

S.FORM: Tounhia tasait ka rauwei ka akoumea ki ryrrymma ki paoul rourouhi appa ki t': hing: ra mang-ah k'atta tou kabatoung-an'ka kmahynna
Tounhia tasait ka rauwei ka akoumea ki ryrrymma ki paoul rourouhi appa ki t': hing: ra mang-ah k'atta tou kabatoung-an'ka kmahynna
S.TRANSL: Hier is een jonghsken dat bijf gerscenbrooden heeft ende twee bischkens maer Wat zijn Dese onder soo beele :
There is a lad here, which hath five barley loaves, and two small fishes: but what are they among so many?
「在這裏有一個孩童，帶着五個大麥餅、兩條魚，只是分給這許多人還算甚麼呢？」

S.FORM: Kani-k'ma tati Jesus, Pa-serroung-au-to ta ta'u:ka madagh hynna ta ahkægh tou itou kou-an kanna. Ka ni-mietroung ta pæ-pæræh rymma katou-noun-nan lava ki vouel.
Kani-k'ma tati Jesus, Pa-serroung-au-to ta ta'u:ka madagh hynna ta ahkægh tou itou kou-an kanna. Ka ni-mietroung ta pæ-pæræh rymma katou-noun-nan lava ki vouel.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus seyde Doet De menschen neder-sitten: ende daer was beel gras in die plaet se. Soo saten Dan De mannen neder ontrent bijf duysent in't getal.
And Jesus said, Make the men sit down. Now there was much grass in the place. So the men sat down, in number about five thousand.
耶穌說：「你們叫眾人坐下。」原來那地方的草多，眾人就坐下，數目約有五千。

S.FORM: Ka ni-ara ti Jesus ta paoul, ka rou ni-pakou-vli-en tyn ma-kou-Alilid ni-matatatagh kiPæh-tætutæu-'en, ka Pahttæutæu-'en[ta ni-matatagh] neini-æn ka mierroung-ato: mahkaulaula ki na t'hing, kma-hynna ki dagh ma-ma ki kameei-in nein.

Ka ni-ara ti Jesus ta paoul, ka rou ni-pakou-vli-en tyn ma-kou-Alilid ni-matatatagh kiPæh-tætutæu-'en, ka Pahttæutæu-'en[ta ni-matatagh] neini-æn ka mierroung-ato: mahkaulaula ki na t'hing, kma-hynna ki dagh ma-ma ki kameei-in nein.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus nam De brooden ende gedankt hebbende deylde hyse den Discipulen ende De Discipulen Den Den ghenen die neder gesten waren desgelijcks oock ban de bischkens soo beele sy wilden.
And Jesus took the loaves; and when he had given thanks, he distributed to the disciples, and the disciples to them that were set down; and likewise of the fishes as much as they would.
耶穌拿起餅來，祝謝了，就分給那坐着的人；分魚也是這樣，都隨着他們所要的。

S.FORM: Irou ka mi-bantau ta ne-ni, ni-k'ma ki Pæhtætæutæu-'en tyn, Illud-d; ki ni-pihpi ka ni-'kda, alei ka assi taurumm'-ah ta amang.
Irou ka mi-bantau ta ne-ni, ni-k'ma ki Pæhtætæutæu-'en tyn, Illud-d; ki ni-pihpi ka ni-'kda, alei ka assi taurumm'-ah ta amang.
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy bersadight waren seyde hy tot sijne Discipulen Dergadert De obergeschotene brocken Op datter niets berlooren en gae.
When they were filled, he said unto his disciples, Gather up the fragments that remain, that nothing be lost.
他們吃飽了，耶穌對門徒說：「把剩下的零碎收拾起來，免得有糟蹋的。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-illud-dan nein pou-tamoes fsat-kyttin æb ki rouha ka Iæi-an ki ni-pihpi ki paoul K'anna ka ryrrimma ka na tav'h, ka ni-'kda nein kman.
Anna ta ni-illud-dan nein pou-tamoes fsat-kyttin æb ki rouha ka Iæi-an ki ni-pihpi ki paoul K'anna ka ryrrimma ka na tav'h, ka ni-'kda nein kman.
S.TRANSL: Sy bergaderdense Dan ende bulden twaelf Korben met brocken ban De bijf gersten brooden welcke obergeschoten waren Den genen die gegeten Hadden.
Therefore they gathered them together, and filled twelve baskets with the fragments of the five barley loaves, which remained over and above unto them that had eaten.
他們便將那五個大麥餅的零碎，就是眾人吃了剩下的，收拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-kmytta ta ta'u ki na poukakidi ti Jesus, ni-k'ma, Missing ti atta ta Tama-Mastæ'i-Tan k'anna ka iro'-il-a-to tou ni.
Irou ka ni-kmytta ta ta'u ki na poukakidi ti Jesus, ni-k'ma, Missing ti atta ta Tama-Mastæ'i-Tan k'anna ka iro'-il-a-to tou ni.
S.TRANSL: De menschen dan geffen hebbende het teken Dat Jesus gedaen hadde seyden Dese is maerlick de Propheet die in De wereldt komen soude.
Then those men, when they had seen the miracle that Jesus did, said, This is of a truth that prophet that should come into the world.
眾人看見耶穌所行的神蹟，就說：「這真是那要到世間來的先知！」

S.FORM: Irou ka kavan-'nan ti Jesus kairo'-ei nein mourang bihyt tyni-æn ka pa-pei-sasou-eih pa-sihbavau ta teni, ni-sa-lala sa-onni mou-voukkyn tou saiit.
Irou ka kavan-'nan ti Jesus kairo'-ei nein mourang bihyt tyni-æn ka pa-pei-sasou-eih pa-sihbavau ta teni, ni-sa-lala sa-onni mou-voukkyn tou saiit.
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan wetende Dat sy souden komen ende hem met ghewelt nemen op Dat sy hem Koningh maeckten ontweeck wederom op den bergh hy selbe alleen.
When Jesus therefore perceived that they would come and take him by force, to make him a king, he departed again into a mountain himself alone.
耶穌既知道眾人要來強逼他作王，就獨自又退到山上去了。 （太14‧22－33；可6‧45－52）

S.FORM: Ka rou madoung-ato, ni-'tdarim ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn mou-vaoung.
Ka rou madoung-ato, ni-'tdarim ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn mou-vaoung.
S.TRANSL: Ende als het abont geworden was gingen sijne Discipulen af na De Zee.
And when even was now come, his disciples went down unto the sea,
到了晚上，他的門徒下海邊去，

S.FORM: Karou ni-mou-avang ni-mou-arouh ta neni ki vaoung mou-koua tou Kapernaum. Ka marimdim-mato, ka assi appa irow'-mato ta ti Jesus neini-æn.
Karou ni-mou-avang ni-mou-arouh ta neni ki vaoung mou-koua tou Kapernaum. Ka marimdim-mato, ka assi appa irow'-mato ta ti Jesus neini-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende in het schip Ghegaen zijnde quamen sy ober De Zeena Capernaum Ende Het was alrede duyster gheworden ende Jesus en was tot haer niet gekomnen.
And entered into a ship, and went over the sea toward Capernaum. And it was now dark, and Jesus was not come to them.
上了船，要過海往迦百農去。天已經黑了，耶穌還沒有來到他們那裏。

S.FORM: Ka ni-rmarouar ta vaoung alei ka ni-bavare ta vare ka vei-joegh.
Ka ni-rmarouar ta vaoung alei ka ni-bavare ta vare ka vei-joegh.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde De Zee berhief haer obermidts Daer een groote windt waeyde.
And the sea arose by reason of a great wind that blew.
忽然狂風大作，海就翻騰起來。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-tau-avang rou-ha kyttiæn æb ki rymma lava ki touro lava kyttin ki stadien [ka na pta ki darang] ni-kmytta ta ne-ni ti Jesus-an ka mou-naunang hmi-halap [ki raloum] ki va-oung, mou-hylli ki avang, ka ni-mahttakout ta neni.

Irou ka ni-tau-avang rouha kyttiæn æb ki rymma lava ki touro lava kyttin ki stadien [ka na pta ki darang] ni-kmytta ta ne-ni ti Jesus-an ka mou-naunang hmi-halap [ki raloum] ki va-oung, mou-hylli ki avang, ka ni-mahttakout ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy ontrent bijf-end-twintigh ofte dertigh sradien gebaren waren sagen sy Jesum wandelende op De Zee ende komende by het schip ende sy wierden bebreeft.
So when they had rowed about five and twenty or thirty furlongs, they see Jesus walking on the sea, and drawing nigh unto the ship: and they were afraid.
門徒搖櫓，約行了十里多路，看見耶穌在海面上走，漸漸近了船，他們就害怕。

S.FORM: Ra ni-kma ta teni nei-ni-æn; Ti jau, ynn4 maht-ta, kout.
Ra ni-kma ta teni nei-ni-æn; Ti jau, ynn4 maht-ta, kout.
S.TRANSL: Maer hy seyde tot haer Ick ben't en zijt niet bebreelt.
But he saith unto them, It is I; be not afraid.
耶穌對他們說：「是我，不要怕！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-masa-roul ta neni pou-avang tyni-æn: ka madys ni-mou-hili ta avang ki pourough ka 'ou-koua-ei-nein.
Ka ni-masa-roul ta neni pou-avang tyni-æn: ka madys ni-mou-hili ta avang ki pourough ka 'ou-koua-ei-nein.
S.TRANSL: Sy heben dan hem gewillighliick in het schip genomen: ende tefront quam het aen het landt Daer sy na toe boeren.
Then they willingly received him into the ship: and immediately the ship was at the land whither they went.
門徒就喜歡接他上船，船立時到了他們所要去的地方。

S.FORM: Tou sasat-appa ki wæ'i ka tou ææugh, irou ka kmytta ta ma-koilalaulau ka tou arough ki va-oung, ka ä'ou-si hynna ki pani ki avang dyk sasisat k'anna, ki ni-pak dakkin-nin ki Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, kaafssi ni-tau-lam ta ti Jesus ki PæhtatTutæu-han tya tau-avang, ra ni-mou-avang mou-snægh ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn:

Tou sasat-appa ki wæ'i ka tou ææugh, irou ka kmytta ta ma-koilalaulau ka tou arough ki va-oung, ka ä'ou-si hynna ki pani ki avang dyk sasisat k'anna, ki ni-pak dakkin-nin ki Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, kaafssi ni-tau-lam ta ti Jesus ki PæhtatTutæu-han tya tau-avang, ra ni-mou-avang mou-snægh ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn:
S.TRANSL: Des anderen daeghs De schare Die arn D'andere zijde der zee stont siende Dat aldaer geen ander scheepken en was Dan Dat eene daer sijne Discipulen in-gegaen waren ende dat Jesus in Dat sheepken niet en was ingegaen maer [dat] sijne Discipulen allen wegh gebaren waren:

The day following, when the people which stood on the other side of the sea saw that there was none other boat there, save that one whereinto his disciples were entered, and that Jesus went not with his disciples into the boat, but that his disciples were gone away alone;
第二日，站在海那邊的眾人知道那裏沒有別的船，只有一隻小船，又知道耶穌沒有同他的門徒上船，乃是門徒自己去的。

S.FORM: (Ra pani kiavang ta ni-ier-rous makka Tiberias mou-hylsi ki i-tou-kou'an k'anna, ki ni-k'an nein ta paoul, ro ni-makou-vli makou-Alilid ta Meirang.)
(Ra pani kiavang ta ni-ier-rous makka Tiberias mou-hylsi ki i-tou-kou'an k'anna, ki ni-k'an nein ta paoul, ro ni-makou-vli makou-Alilid ta Meirang.)
S.TRANSL: ( Doch daer quamen andere scheepkens ban TiberÃ­as na by De plaetse Daer sy Het brood gegeten hadden als De Heere gedanckt hadde. )
(Howbeit there came other boats from Tiberias nigh unto the place where they did eat bread, after that the Lord had given thanks:)
然而，有幾隻小船從提比哩亞來，靠近主祝謝後分餅給人吃的地方。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-kmytta ta ma-koilalaulau ka ä'ou-si hynna ta ti Jesus ki Pxhtatæutæu-han appa tyn, nimou-avang appa ta neni, mou-koua tou Kapernaum, ka kma kiym ti Jesus-an.
Irou ka ni-kmytta ta ma-koilalaulau ka ä'ou-si hynna ta ti Jesus ki Pxhtatæutæu-han appa tyn, nimou-avang appa ta neni, mou-koua tou Kapernaum, ka kma kiym ti Jesus-an.
S.TRANSL: Doe Doe dan De schare sagh dat Jesus aldaer niet en Was noch sijne Discipulen so gingen sy oock inde schepen ende quamen tot Taupernaum soeckende Jesum.
When the people therefore saw that Jesus was not there, neither his disciples, they also took shipping, and came to Capernaum, seeking for Jesus.
眾人見耶穌和門徒都不在那裏，就上了船，往迦百農去找耶穌。

S.FORM: Karou ni-ma-ki-valei ta neni tyni-æn tou arouh ki va-oung, ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Rabbi, ni-iesroua-kow ka mannou his ?
Karou ni-ma-ki-valei ta neni tyni-æn tou arouh ki va-oung, ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Rabbi, ni-iesroua-kow ka mannou his ?
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy hem ghebonden Hadden ober de zee seyden sy tot hem Rabbi wanneer zijt ghy Hier gekomen :
And when they had found him on the other side of the sea, they said unto him, Rabbi, when camest thou hither?
既在海那邊找着了，就對他說：「拉比，是幾時到這裏來的？」

S.FORM: Ni-matt'i-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-n, Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, kma-ki'ym-kamou jau-an, assi alei ka ni-k'yt-ta-'n-noumi ta pou-kidi-en, alei-appa ka ni-kman-kamou ki paoul 'k-bantau.
Ni-matt'i-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-n, Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, kma-ki'ym-kamou jau-an, assi alei ka ni-k'yt-ta-'n-noumi ta pou-kidi-en, alei-appa ka ni-kman-kamou ki paoul 'k-bantau.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoorde haer ende seyde Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u ghy soeckt my niet om dat ghy teeckemen gesien hebt maer om Dat ghy ban De brooden gegeten hebt ende ber sadight zijt.
Jesus answered them and said, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Ye seek me, not because ye saw the miracles, but because ye did eat of the loaves, and were filled.
耶穌回答說：「我實實在在地告訴你們，你們找我，並不是因見了神蹟，乃是因吃餅得飽。

S.FORM: Ynn4 mapoungas [alei] ki avovok-kun ka sa-nynno, râ [a-lei-appa] kiavokkun ka mæ-'ylli tou kuag-han ka myhkaqua myddaryn-nough, ka phæ-n-neih ymoumi-n ta Alak ki kaeu-loung :ka teni k'atta ta ni-pou-ta-peejou-en ki Alid Rama.

Ynn4 mapoungas [alei] ki avovok-kun ka sa-nynno, râ [alei-appa] kiavokkun ka mæ-'ylli tou kuag-han ka myhkaqua myddaryn-nough, ka phæ-n-neih ymoumi-n ta Alak ki kaeu-loung :ka teni k'atta ta ni-pou-ta-peejou-en ki Alid Rama.
S.TRANSL: Werckt niet [om] de spijse die bergaet maer [om] de spijse Die blijft tot in Het eeuwighe leben welcke De Sone Des menschen m-lieden gheben sal : want desen heeft Godt De Dader berzegelt.
Labour not for the meat which perisheth, but for that meat which endureth unto everlasting life, which the Son of man shall give unto you: for him hath God the Father sealed.
不要為那必壞的食物勞力，要為那存到永生的食物勞力，就是人子要賜給你們的，因為人子是父上帝所印證的。」

S.FORM: Annata ni k'mata neni ty-ni-æn, Oumang-ah-kame, atei ka kapoun gas-au-mian ta papei-ra ryngi-ryngei ki Alid?
Annata ni k'mata neni ty-ni-æn, Oumang-ah-kame, atei ka kapoun gas-au-mian ta papei-ra ryngi-ryngei ki Alid?
S.TRANSL: Sy seyden dan tot hem Wat sullen wy doen op dat Wy De wercken Godts mo gen wercken:
Then said they unto him, What shall we do, that we might work the works of God?
眾人問他說：「我們當行甚麼才算做上帝的工呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Atta ta pei-ra-ryngaryngei ki Alid, ka tna-mfing-ah-kamou tyni-æn, ka ni-padingi-en tyn.
Ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Atta ta pei-ra-ryngaryngei ki Alid, ka tna-mfing-ah-kamou tyni-æn, ka ni-padingi-en tyn.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoorde ende seyde tot haer Dit is Het werch Godts Dat ghy geloobet in hem dien hy gesonden Heeft.
Jesus answered and said unto them, This is the work of God, that ye believe on him whom he hath sent.
耶穌回答說：「信上帝所差來的，這就是做上帝的工。」

S.FORM: Annatani-k'ma'ta neni tyni-æn, Pou-kidi-en ki mang ka pa-am 't-en-hou alei ka k'ytt-ei-mian ta atta tna-msing ymhou-an? Mapoungas-kow ki mang?
Annatani-k'ma'ta neni tyni-æn, Pou-kidi-en ki mang ka pa-am 't-en-hou alei ka k'ytt-ei-mian ta atta tna-msing ymhou-an? Mapoungas-kow ki mang?
S.TRANSL: Sy Sy seyden dan tot hem Wat teecken Doet ghy Dan op dat wy Het moghen sien ende u gelooben : Wat werckt ghy :
They said therefore unto him, What sign shewest thou then, that we may see, and believe thee? what dost thou work?
他們又說：「你行甚麼神蹟，叫我們看見就信你；你到底做甚麼事呢？

S.FORM: Ni-k'man ta na ramou-jan ki Manna tou poulgh: mama ki ni-sfoulat-ten-da, Ni-phæn tyn pavok neini-æn ki paoul kamak-ka vullum.
Ni-k'man ta na ramou-jan ki Manna tou poulgh: mama ki ni-sfoulat-ten-da, Ni-phæn tyn pavok neini-æn ki paoul kamak-ka vullum.
S.TRANSL: Onse Daders hebben het Manna ghegeten in De woestijne: geliick geschreben is Hy gaf haer Het broodt uyt Den Hemel te eten.
Our fathers did eat manna in the desert; as it is written, He gave them bread from heaven to eat.
我們的祖宗在曠野吃過嗎哪，如經上寫着說：『他從天上賜下糧來給他們吃。』」

S.FORM: Annatani-k'mata ti Jesus neini-æn, Missing, missing koun-na u-kamou-ra, assi ni-pi-'æta ti Mofes ymou-mi-an ki paoul kamakka vullum: ra Raram-appa-mau ta pi-æ' ymoumi-n ki paoul ka d'lligh ka makka tounnoun ki vullum.

Annatani-k'mata ti Jesus neini-æn, Missing, missing koun-na u-kamou-ra, assi ni-pi-'æta ti Mofes ymou-mi-an ki paoul kamakka vullum: ra Raram-appa-mau ta pi-æ' ymoumi-n ki paoul ka d'lligh ka makka tounnoun ki vullum.
S.TRANSL: Jesus dan seyde tot haer Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u Moses en heeft u niet gegeben het broodt uyt Den Hemel : maer mijn DaDer geeft u dat ware broodt uyt den hemel.
Then Jesus said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Moses gave you not that bread from heaven; but my Father giveth you the true bread from heaven.
耶穌說：「我實實在在地告訴你們，那從天上來的糧不是摩西賜給你們的，乃是我父將天上來的真糧賜給你們。

S.FORM: Ka paoul ki Alid ta teni ka ni-mourarim makka toun-noun ki vullum, ka pi-'æ ki kæu-ag-han ki ni.
Ka paoul ki Alid ta teni ka ni-mourarim makka toun-noun ki vullum, ka pi-'æ ki kæuag-han ki ni.
S.TRANSL: Want Het broodt Gods is hy die uyt Den hemel nederdaelt ende Die De werelt Het leben geeft.
For the bread of God is he which cometh down from heaven, and giveth life unto the world.
因為上帝的糧就是那從天上降下來、賜生命給世界的。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma ta nenity-ni-æn, Meirang, pæ'-kakou'-ei-kame ki paoul katta.
Annata ni-k'ma ta nenity-ni-æn, Meirang, pæ'-kakou'-ei-kame ki paoul katta.
S.TRANSL: Sy seyden Dan tot hem Deere geeft ons altijdt dit broodt.
Then said they unto him, Lord, evermore give us this bread.
他們說：「主啊，常將這糧賜給我們！」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Ti jau ta paoul ki kæuag-han: ti-mamang ta mou-keua jau-an, myhkakoua assi mi-hgangei-ah: timamang appa ta tna-mfing jau-an, myhkakoua assi meitou-ah.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Ti jau ta paoul ki kæuag-han: ti-mamang ta mou-keua jau-an, myhkakoua assi mi-hgangei-ah: timamang appa ta tna-mfing jau-an, myhkakoua assi meitou-ah.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus seyde tot haer Ick ben Het broodt Des lebens : Die tot my konmt en sal geensins hongeren ende Die in my gelooft en sal nimmermeer dorsten.
And Jesus said unto them, I am the bread of life: he that cometh to me shall never hunger; and he that believeth on me shall never thirst.
耶穌說：「我就是生命的糧。到我這裏來的，必定不餓；信我的，永遠不渴。

S.FORM: Ra ni-pasousou-en-nau-kamou ka ni-k'ytta-n-noumi jaan, ka assi-kamou tna-msing-ato.
Ra ni-pasousou-en-nau-kamou ka ni-k'ytta-n-noumi jaan, ka assi-kamou tna-msing-ato.
S.TRANSL: Maer ick hebbe u geseght Dat ghy my oock gesien hebt ende ghy en gelooft niet.
But I said unto you, That ye also have seen me, and believe not.
只是我對你們說過，你們已經看見我，還是不信。

S.FORM: Kamamang ka phan-koh ki Rama moukou-ah jau-an-ka ti-maman ta moukoua jau-an, assi-mau s'aki-tau wagh-an-ei ta_teni.
Kamamang ka phan-koh ki Rama moukou-ah jau-an-ka ti-maman ta moukoua jau-an, assi-mau s'aki-tau wagh-an-ei ta_teni.
S.TRANSL: Al wat my de Dader geeft geeft sal tot my komen : ende Die tot my komt en sal ick geensins uytwerpen.
All that the Father giveth me shall come to me; and him that cometh to me I will in no wise cast out.
凡父所賜給我的人必到我這裏來；到我這裏來的，我總不丟棄他。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mou-rarim-koh makka tounnoun ki vullum, assi alei ka pa'-m 't-au-mau ta kamoei-en-nau, râ kamoei-in appa tyn ka ni-madingi jau-an.
Ka ni-mou-rarim-koh makka tounnoun ki vullum, assi alei ka pa'-m 't-au-mau ta kamoei-en-nau, râ kamoei-in appa tyn ka ni-madingi jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Want ick ben uyt Den hemel neder-gedaelt niet op Dat ick mijnen wille sonde doen maer Den wilie des genen die my gesonden heeft.
For I came down from heaven, not to do mine own will, but the will of him that sent me.
因為我從天上降下來，不是要按自己的意思行，乃是要按那差我來者的意思行。

S.FORM: Atta ta kamoei-in ki Rama ka ni-madingi jau-an, ka ast si-koh patau-rumma-ah ki ma-mang ki ni-phæn tyn jau-an, ra pazhpit-ei-mau k'anna tou wæ'i ka tou æugh.
Atta ta kamoei-in ki Rama ka ni-madingi jau-an, ka ast si-koh patau-rumma-ah ki ma-mang ki ni-phæn tyn jau-an, ra pazhpit-ei-mau k'anna tou wæ'i ka tou æugh.
S.TRANSL: Ende Dit is de wille des Daders Die my ghesonden heeft Dat al wat hy my gegeben heeft ick daer uyt niet en bertiese maer het selbe opwecke ten uyter sien dage.
And this is the Father's will which hath sent me, that of all which he hath given me I should lose nothing, but should raise it up again at the last day.
差我來者的意思就是：他所賜給我的，叫我一個也不失落，在末日卻叫他復活。

S.FORM: Att'-appa ta kamoei-in tyn ka ni-madingi jau-an, ym-mid ka mararau ki Alk tna-msing tyni-æn, akoumea ki kæuag-han ka myh ka koua myd-darynnough: ka pa-æhpit-ei-mau ta teni tou wa'i ka tou æ-æugh.
Att'-appa ta kamoei-in tyn ka ni-madingi jau-an, ym-mid ka mararau ki Alk tna-msing tyni-æn, akoumea ki kæuag-han ka myh ka koua myd-darynnough: ka pa-æhpit-ei-mau ta teni tou wa'i ka tou æ-æugh.
S.TRANSL: Ende Dit is De wile des genen Die my gesonden heeft Dat een yegelick Die den Sone aenschouwt ende in hem gelooft het eeuwige leben hebbe : ende ick sal hem opwecken ten uyterften dage.
And this is the will of him that sent me, that every one which seeth the Son, and believeth on him, may have everlasting life: and I will raise him up at the last day.
因為我父的意思是叫一切見子而信的人得永生，並且在末日我要叫他復活。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mimævurmour ta Joden tyni-n alei kina sou tyn, Ti jau ta paoul ka ni-mou-ra-rim makka tounnoun ki vullum.
Ka ni-mimævurmour ta Joden tyni-n alei kina sou tyn, Ti jau ta paoul ka ni-mou-ra-rim makka tounnoun ki vullum.
S.TRANSL: De Joden dan murmureer den ober hem om Dat hy geseght hadde Ick ben het broodt Dat uyt Den Hemel neder-gedaelt is.
The Jews then murmured at him, because he said, I am the bread which came down from heaven.
猶太人因為耶穌說「我是從天上降下來的糧」，就私下議論他，

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta neni, Asi kauwa ti atta ta ti Jesus ka alak ti Joses, ka k'alang-'n-nin ki Rama ki raren'-an tyn? Mattæ'i-ma-na ki mang ta ti atta, Ni-mou-ra-im-koh makka tounnoun ki vullum?
Ka ni-k'ma ta neni, Asi kauwa ti atta ta ti Jesus ka alak ti Joses, ka k'alang-'n-nin ki Rama ki raren'-an tyn? Mattæ'i-ma-na ki mang ta ti atta, Ni-mou-ra-im-koh makka tounnoun ki vullum?
S.TRANSL: Ende sy seyden Is dese niet Jesus De sone Josephs wiens bader ende moeder wy kennen : Doe seght dese ban Ick ben uyt den Demel neder-gedaelt.
And they said, Is not this Jesus, the son of Joseph, whose father and mother we know? how is it then that he saith, I came down from heaven?
說：「這不是約瑟的兒子耶穌嗎？他的父母我們豈不認得嗎？他如今怎麼說『我是從天上降下來的』呢？」

S.FORM: Annata ni-mattæ'i-y'li tati Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Ynna mii-nadd-nadd mEi-mææu-rmour-rmour.
Annata ni-mattæ'i-y'li tati Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Ynna mii-nadd-nadd mEi-mææu-rmour-rmour.
S.TRANSL: Jesus anwoorde dan ende ende seyde tot haer En murmureert niet onder malkanderen.
Jesus therefore answered and said unto them, Murmur not among yourselves.
耶穌回答說：「你們不要大家議論。

S.FORM: Assi mou-lpough ta ti-mamang mou-koua jau-an, rou assi vihyt-tyn ta teni ki Ramaka ni-madingi jau-an , ka pæ-hpit-ei-mau ta teni tou wæ-'i ka tou æugh.
Assi mou-lpough ta ti-mamang mou-koua jau-an, rou assi vihyt-tyn ta teni ki Ramaka ni-madingi jau-an , ka pæ-hpit-ei-mau ta teni tou wæ'i ka tou æugh.
S.TRANSL: Niemant en Kan tot my komen 't en zy Dat De Dader die my ghesonden heeft hem trecke : ende ick sal hem. opwecken ten uytersten dage.
No man can come to me, except the Father which hath sent me draw him: and I will raise him up at the last day.
若不是差我來的父吸引人，就沒有能到我這裏來的；到我這裏來的，在末日我要叫他復活。

S.FORM: Ka ni-sfoulat-ten tou [na sasoulat] ki Tama-Mattæ'i-tan, Ka pah-kou-ymd-dih ta neni mhtæutæu'ugh ki Alid. Annata mmud ka ni-millingigh [ki atta] ki Rama. ka ni-pæhtæutæu'-en-n-appa, ta mou-koua jau-an.

Ka ni-sfoulat-ten tou [na sasoulat] ki Tama-Mattæ'i-tan, Ka pah-kou-ymd-dih ta neni mhtæutæu'ugh ki Alid. Annata mmud ka ni-millingigh [ki atta] ki Rama. ka ni-pæhtæutæu'-en-n-appa, ta mou-koua jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Daer is gheschreben in De Propheten Ende sy sullen alle ban Godt ghellert zijn. Een yegeliick dan die [het] ban den Dader ghehoort ende geleert heeft Die komt tot my.
It is written in the prophets, And they shall be all taught of God. Every man therefore that hath heard, and hath learned of the Father, cometh unto me.
在先知書上寫着說：『他們都要蒙上帝的教訓。』凡聽見父之教訓又學習的，就到我這裏來。

S.FORM: Assi ka ni-k'ytt'-an ta Rama ti-mamang, dyk tyni-æn ka ni-makka-koua ki Alid: teni ta ni-kmytta ki Rama.
Assi ka ni-k'ytt'-an ta Rama ti-mamang, dyk tyni-æn ka ni-makka-koua ki Alid: teni ta ni-kmytta ki Rama.
S.TRANSL: Niet Dat yemandt den Dader gesien heeft Dan die ban Godt is : Dese heeft den Dader gesien.
Not that any man hath seen the Father, save he which is of God, he hath seen the Father.
這不是說有人看見過父，惟獨從上帝來的，他看見過父。

S.FORM: Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou-ra, ti-mamang ta tna-msing jau-an, akoumea ki kæuag-han ka myhkakoua myddaryn-nough.
Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou-ra, ti-mamang ta tna-msing jau-an, akoumea ki kæuag-han ka myhkakoua myddaryn-nough.
S.TRANSL: Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u Die in my gelooft heeft Het eenwige leben.
Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that believeth on me hath everlasting life.
我實實在在地告訴你們，信的人有永生。

S.FORM: Tijau tapaoul ki keuag-han.
Tijau tapaoul ki keuag-han.
S.TRANSL: Ick ben het brood des lebens.
I am that bread of life.
我就是生命的糧。

S.FORM: Ni-kman ta na Ramou-oumi ki Mannatou poulzgh, ka ni-mapatei ta neni.
Ni-kman ta na Ramou-oumi ki Mannatou poulzgh, ka ni-mapatei ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Dwe Daders hebben het Manna gegeten in De woesijne ende sy zijt gestorben.
Your fathers did eat manna in the wilderness, and are dead.
你們的祖宗在曠野吃過嗎哪，還是死了。

S.FORM: Atta ta paoul ka ni-mou-rarim makka tounnoun ki vul-lum, alei ka kman-ah ki atta ta ti-mamang ka taou, ka assi mapatei-ah ta teni.
Atta ta paoul ka ni-mou-rarim makka tounnoun ki vullum, alei ka kman-ah ki atta ta ti-mamang ka taou, ka assi mapatei-ah ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Dit is Het broodt dat uyt Den Hemel neder-Daelt op Dat de mensche Daer ban cte ende niet en sterbe.
This is the bread which cometh down from heaven, that a man may eat thereof, and not die.
這是從天上降下來的糧，叫人吃了就不死。

S.FORM: Tijau ta paoul k'anna ka mæuagh ka ni-mou-rarim makka tounnoun ki vullum: ti-maman ta kman ki paoul katta mæuæ-'ah tateni tou yhka kouan mydda-rynnough. Kapaoul ka ph-ei-mau vit-au k'anna, ka ph-ei-mau alei ki kauag-han ki ni.

Tijau ta paoul k'anna ka mæuagh ka ni-mou-rarim makka tounnoun ki vullum: ti-maman ta kman ki paoul katta mæuæ-'ah tateni tou yhka kouan mydda-rynnough. Kapaoul ka ph-ei-mau vit-au k'anna, ka ph-ei-mau alei ki kauag-han ki ni.
S.TRANSL: Ick Ick ben Dat lebende broodt dat uyt Den hemel neDer-gedaelt is : soo yemandt ban Dit broodt eet die sal inder eenwigheyt leben. Ende het broot Dat ik geben sal is mijn bleesch het welck ick geben sal boor Het leben Der werelt.
I am the living bread which came down from heaven: if any man eat of this bread, he shall live for ever: and the bread that I will give is my flesh, which I will give for the life of the world.
我是從天上降下來生命的糧；人若吃這糧，就必永遠活着。我所要賜的糧就是我的肉，為世人之生命所賜的。」

S.FORM: Anna tani-macyt ki fou ta Joden matta'i-naunado, k'ma,'s pough mama ki mang pakan ta ti atta ymytt-n ki vaiit tyn
Anna tani-macyt ki fou ta Joden matta'i-naunado, k'ma,'s pough mama ki mang pakan ta ti atta ymytt-n ki vaiit tyn
S.TRANSL: De Joden Dan streden onder malkanderen seggende Hoe kan ons dese [sijn] bleesch te eten geben:
The Jews therefore strove among themselves, saying, How can this man give us his flesh to eat?
因此，猶太人彼此爭論說：「這個人怎能把他的肉給我們吃呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus nei-ni-æn, Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, heirou assi-kamou kman ki vait ki Alak ki kaeu-loung, æ'ou-si-kamou ki kæuag-han ymoumi-æn.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus nei-ni-æn, Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, heirou assi-kamou kman ki vait ki Alak ki kaeu-loung, æ'ou-si-kamou ki kæuag-han ymoumi-æn.
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan seyde tot Haer Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u lieden ten zy Dat ghy het bleesch Des Soons des menschen etet ende sijn bloet drincket soo en hebt ghy geen leben in u selben.
Then Jesus said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, Except ye eat the flesh of the Son of man, and drink his blood, ye have no life in you.
耶穌說：「我實實在在地告訴你們，你們若不吃人子的肉，不喝人子的血，就沒有生命在你們裏面。

S.FORM: Ti-mamang ta kman ki vasit-au,bta myt ki'æmagh-au akoumea ki kæuag-han ka myhka koua myddarynnough: ka pæ-æhpit-au-mau ta teni tou wæi ka tou æugh.
Ti-mamang ta kman ki vasit-au,bta myt ki'æmagh-au akoumea ki kæuag-han ka myhka koua myddarynnough: ka pæ-æhpit-au-mau ta teni tou wæi ka tou æugh.
S.TRANSL: Die mijn bleesch eet enDe Mijn bloet drinckt die heeft het eeuwige leben: ende ick sal hem opwecken ten uytersten dage.
Whoso eateth my flesh, and drinketh my blood, hath eternal life; and I will raise him up at the last day.
吃我肉、喝我血的人就有永生，在末日我要叫他復活。

S.FORM: Kaavokkun ka d'lligh ta vadt-au, ytappa ka dilligh ta 'æ-magh-au.
Kaavokkun ka d'lligh ta vadt-au, ytappa ka dilligh ta 'æ-magh-au.
S.TRANSL: Want mijn bleesch is waerliick spijse ende mijn bloet is waerlick dranck.
For my flesh is meat indeed, and my blood is drink indeed.
我的肉真是可吃的，我的血真是可喝的。

S.FORM: Ti-mamang ta kman ki vait-au, ta myt ki 'æmagh-au, i-tou-koua ta teni jau-an, ka i-tou-koua-app'-'oh tyni-æn.
Ti-mamang ta kman ki vait-au, ta myt ki 'æmagh-au, i-tou-koua ta teni jau-an, ka i-tou-koua-app'-'oh tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Die Mijn bleesch eet ende mijn bloet drinckt Die blijt in my ende ick in hem.
He that eateth my flesh, and drinketh my blood, dwelleth in me, and I in him.
吃我肉、喝我血的人常在我裏面，我也常在他裏面。

S.FORM: Mama ki ni-padingi-en-koh ki R ama ka mæuagh, ka ke-uægh-en-naualei ki Rama, [kom-ma-hynna ] ti-mamangta kman jau-an, mæuæg-ahtatenialeijau-an.
Mama ki ni-padingi-en-koh ki R ama ka mæuagh, ka ke-uægh-en-naualei ki Rama, [kom-ma-hynna ] ti-mamangta kman jau-an, mæuæg-ahtatenialeijau-an.
S.TRANSL: Gelijckerwijs my de ledbende Dader ghesonden heefe ende ick e boor den DaDader [alfoo] Die my eet de selbe sal leben door my.
As the living Father hath sent me, and I live by the Father: so he that eateth me, even he shall live by me.
永活的父怎樣差我來，我又因父活着；照樣，吃我肉的人也要因我活着。

S.FORM: Atta ta paoul ka ni-mou-ra-rim makka tounnoun ki vullum Assi mama ki ni-kan-nunki nara-mou-oumi ta Manna, ka ni-mapa-tei ta nent:ti-mamang ta kman ki paoul katta mæu æ'g-hah ta teni tou yhka kou'an myddaryn-nough.

Atta ta paoul ka ni-mou-ra-rim makka tounnoun ki vullum Assi mama ki ni-kan-nunki nara-mou-oumi ta Manna, ka ni-mapa-tei ta nent:ti-mamang ta kman ki paoul katta mæu æ'g-hah ta teni tou yhka kou'an myddaryn-nough.
S.TRANSL: Dit is het broodt dat uyt den Hemel neder-gedaelt is. Niet geliick uwe baders het Manna gegeten hebben Ende zijn ghestorben : Die Dit broodt eet sal in Der eeuwigheyt leben.
This is that bread which came down from heaven: not as your fathers did eat manna, and are dead: he that eateth of this bread shall live for ever.
這就是從天上降下來的糧。吃這糧的人就永遠活着，不像你們的祖宗吃過嗎哪還是死了。」

S.FORM: Kamamang k'atta ni-pa-sousou-en tyn tou Pæui-sasaal-lan, dou mæhtæutæu'ug tou Kapernaum.
Kamamang k'atta ni-pa-sousou-en tyn tou Pæui-sasaal-lan, dou mæhtæutæu'ug tou Kapernaum.
S.TRANSL: Dese dingen seyde Hy in De Synagoge leerende te Capernaum.
These things said he in the synagogue, as he taught in Capernaum.
這些話是耶穌在迦百農會堂裏教訓人說的。

S.FORM: Mabatoung ki Pæhtatæu-tæu-han tyn ka millingigh [ ki at-ta]tani k'ma, Mæt'æhta sou kat-ta: ti-mang ta tna-lpoug ki atta millingigh.
Mabatoung ki Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn ka millingigh [ ki at-ta]tani k'ma, Mæt'æhta sou katta: ti-mang ta tna-lpoug ki atta millingigh.
S.TRANSL: Dele Dan ban sijne Discipulen [ dit ] hoorenDe seyden Dese reden is hardt wie Kan deselde hooren.
Many therefore of his disciples, when they had heard this, said, This is an hard saying; who can hear it?
他的門徒中有好些人聽見了，就說：「這話甚難，誰能聽呢？」

S.FORM: Irou ka'ou-mhgan ti Jesus mou-madou tyni-æn ka mim-æummu alei ki atta ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, nik'maneini-æn, Pa-saisala kouap kaua ta atta pa-ka-te ymoumi-æn?
Irou ka'ou-mhgan ti Jesus mou-madou tyni-æn ka mim-æummu alei ki atta ta Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, nik'maneini-æn, Pa-saisala kouap kaua ta atta pa-ka-te ymoumi-æn?
S.TRANSL: Jesus nu wetende by hemt selben Dat sijne Discipulen daer ober murmureerden seyde Hy tot haer Ergert ulieden dit :
When Jesus knew in himself that his disciples murmured at it, he said unto them, Doth this offend you?
耶穌心裏知道門徒為這話議論，就對他們說：「這話是叫你們厭棄嗎？

S.FORM: Ou-mang- [al-ato] rou kmytt'-ah-kamou ki Alak ki ka-æuloung ka sa-bavau tou ni-itou-aurou-en tyn i-tou-koua?
Ou-mang- [al-ato] rou kmytt'-ah-kamou ki Alak ki ka-æuloung ka sa-bavau tou ni-itou-aurou-en tyn i-tou-koua?
S.TRANSL: [ Wat zoudâ€™et ] Dan [zijn] soo ghy den Sone des menschen saeghet op-baren daer hy te booren was :
What and if ye shall see the Son of man ascend up where he was before?
倘或你們看見人子升到他原來所在之處，怎麼樣呢？

S.FORM: Joep-pan ta pa-kæu ægh: sauki-nynno ta vait. Joep-pan ki kæuag-han-appa ta fou ka pa-sousou-en-nau ymou mi-æn.
Joep-pan ta pa-kæu ægh: sauki-nynno ta vait. Joep-pan ki kæuag-han-appa ta fou ka pa-sousou-en-nau ymou mi-æn.
S.TRANSL: De Geest is het die lebendigh maeckt : Het bleesch en is niet nut. De woorden Die ick tot u sprecke zijt Geeft ende zijn leben.
It is the spirit that quickeneth; the flesh profiteth nothing: the words that I speak unto you, they are spirit, and they are life.
叫人活着的乃是靈，肉體是無益的。我對你們所說的話就是靈，就是生命。

S.FORM: Ra akoumea ki rarouma ymoumi-æn ka assi tna-'mfsing. kavan 'nanti Jesus tou nau-namou na mamang ta neni ka assi tna-msing, ti-mang-appa ta teni ka sivanna vanna-ah tyni-æn.
Ra akoumea ki rarouma ymoumi-æn ka assi tna-'mfsing. kavan 'nanti Jesus tou naunamou na mamang ta neni ka assi tna-msing, ti-mang-appa ta teni ka sivanna vanna-ah tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Maer Maer daer zijn sommige ban u lieden die en delooden. Want Jesus wist ban den beginne wie sy waren die niet geloofden ende wie hy was Die hem berraDen soude.
But there are some of you that believe not. For Jesus knew from the beginning who they were that believed not, and who should betray him.
只是你們中間有不信的人。」耶穌從起頭就知道誰不信他，誰要賣他。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'mata teni, Aleiki atta ni-pa-sousou-en-nau-kamou, ka assi mou-lpough ta ti-mamang mou-koua jau-an, rou assi pæp'æp-'æ ta atta tyni-æn ki Rama-au.
Ka ni-k'mata teni, Aleiki atta ni-pa-sousou-en-nau-kamou, ka assi mou-lpough ta ti-mamang mou-koua jau-an, rou assi pæp'æp-'æ ta atta tyni-æn ki Rama-au.
S.TRANSL: Ende hy seyde Daerom hebbe ick u geseght Dat niemandt tot my komen en kan 't en zy dat het hem gegeben zy ban mijnen Dader.
And he said, Therefore said I unto you, that no man can come unto me, except it were given unto him of my Father.
耶穌又說：「所以我對你們說過，若不是蒙我父的恩賜，沒有人能到我這裏來。」

S.FORM: Tou kidi kanna ni-d'ma-rang mææu-lyk-kough ta maba-toung ka Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, ka ashh ni-mou-naunang hmi-sala tou lam tyni-æn.
Tou kidi kanna ni-d'ma-rang mææu-lyk-kough ta maba-toung ka Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn, ka ashh ni-mou-naunang hmi-sala tou lam tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Dan Doen af ginghen bele sijner Discipulen te rugghe ende en wandelden niet meer met hem.
From that time many of his disciples went back, and walked no more with him.
從此，他門徒中多有退去的，不再和他同行。

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'matati Jesus ki saat-kyttiæn k'anna æb ki rou-ha, Mamoei-appa kau wa d''mma-rang ta ymoumi?
Annata ni-k'matati Jesus ki saat-kyttiæn k'anna æb ki rouha, Mamoei-appa kau wa d''mma-rang ta ymoumi?
S.TRANSL: Jesus dan seyde tot De twaelbe Wilt ghy-lieDen oock niet wegh gaen:
Then said Jesus unto the twelve, Will ye also go away?
耶穌就對那十二個門徒說：「你們也要去嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vlli tyni-æn ta ti Simon Petrus, Meirang, d'mmarang-ah-kame mou-koua ti-mang-an'akoumea-kow ki fou ki kæuag-han ka myhkakoua myddaryn-nough.
Ni-mattæ'i-vlli tyni-æn ta ti Simon Petrus, Meirang, d'mmarang-ah-kame mou-koua ti-mang-an'akoumea-kow ki fou ki kæuag-han ka myhkakoua myddaryn-nough.
S.TRANSL: Simon Petrus dan antwoorde hem Heere tot wien sullen wy henen gaen: ghy hebt De Woorden des eeuwigen lebens.
Then Simon Peter answered him, Lord, to whom shall we go? thou hast the words of eternal life.
西門‧彼得回答說：「主啊，你有永生之道，我們還歸從誰呢？

S.FORM: Ka ni-tna-msing-kame ka ni-mou-mhga-kame, ka ti Christus kow, Alak ki Alid ka mæu-agh.
Ka ni-tna-msing-kame ka ni-mou-mhga-kame, ka ti Christus kow, Alak ki Alid ka mæu-agh.
S.TRANSL: Ende wy hebben gelooft ende bekent Dat ghy zijt De Christus De Sone des lebendigen Godts.
And we believe and are sure that thou art that Christ, the Son of the living God.
我們已經信了，又知道你是上帝的聖者。」

S.FORM: Ni-matt'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi-mau-kamon kauwa ni-peri ta sasat kyttin 'æb kirouha? ra sasat ymoumi-æn ta Littou?
Ni-matt'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi-mau-kamon kauwa ni-peri ta sasat kyttin 'æb kirouha? ra sasat ymoumi-æn ta Littou?
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoorde haer en hebbe ick niet u twaelbe uytberkoren : ende een uyt u iseen Duybel :
Jesus answered them, Have not I chosen you twelve, and one of you is a devil?
耶穌說：「我不是揀選了你們十二個門徒嗎？但你們中間有一個是魔鬼。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn [ta atta] mattæ'imymmia ri Judas-an ka ti Simon Iskarioth. Ka teni ta si-vanavana-âl-ato tyni-æn, ka saasat ta teni ki saäsat kytti-æen'æn ki rouha.
Ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn [ta atta] mattæ'imymmia ri Judas-an ka ti Simon Iskarioth. Ka teni ta si-vanavana-âl-ato tyni-æn, ka saasat ta teni ki saäsat kytti-æen'æn ki rouha.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde hy seyde [ dit van ] Judas Simonis Jscarioth. Want Dese soude Hem berraden zijnde een ban De twaelbe.
He spake of Judas Iscariot the son of Simon: for he it was that should betray him, being one of the twelve.
耶穌這話是指着加略人西門的兒子猶大說的；他本是十二個門徒裏的一個，後來要賣耶穌的。
